name: memhub
description: Auto-capture Claude Code sessions into MemHub team memory. Incremental flushes on commit/PR events (PostToolUse hooks) plus a SessionEnd backstop read the transcript and save it via the memhub-staging MCP, which runs tool-aware (agentic) extraction of facts, episodes, and artifacts with watermark-based delta dedup. Ships skills for terminal artifact uploads (save-artifact), on-demand session import (import-session), and team-memory recall (search-memory).
